description_long: This airplane features a compact, boxy fuselage with a predominantly green and red color scheme, accented by geometric shapes and stylized protrusions. The wings are long, slender, and extend from the upper section of the fuselage, with a slight upward angle and a unique, angular design. At the front, there is a prominent, spiked red nose cone, while the rear is adorned with a similarly spiked tail structure. The airplane has two red, cylindrical side pods with spiked ends, likely representing engines or armaments, attached symmetrically to the fuselage. The cockpit is positioned above the main body, enclosed by a dome-like canopy with a pink and cream pattern. The overall design is highly stylized, with exaggerated features and a mechanical, almost toy-like appearance.
description: A stylized, boxy green and red airplane with long, angular wings, spiked nose and tail, and a dome-shaped cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the dome-shaped cockpit canopy, the long wings extending outward, and the symmetrical red side pods.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the upward-angled wings, the spiked nose cone, and the rear tail structure.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the spiked red nose, the symmetry of the side pods, and the central cockpit above the fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear-side view displaying the spiked tail, the green and yellow rear details, and the angular wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with long, straight wings featuring slight upward dihedral and angular tips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin cylindrical side-mounted engines or pods, type not explicitly visible.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and spiked horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a dome-shaped canopy, likely single-seat.
